categories.name: Anti-Infective
categories.description: Antibiotics, antivirals, antifungals, and antimicrobial agents.

categories.name: Cardiovascular
categories.description: Cardiac drugs, antihypertensives, anticoagulants, and lipid-lowering agents.

categories.name: Digestive / GI
categories.description: GI agents, antacids, laxatives, and anti-emetics.

categories.name: Endocrine
categories.description: Hormones, insulin, thyroid agents, and diabetes medications.

categories.name: Integumentary
categories.description: Topical agents, wound care, and dermatological treatments.

categories.name: Musculoskeletal / Pain
categories.description: Pain management, anti-inflammatory drugs, and musculoskeletal agents.

categories.name: Nervous System
categories.description: Anticonvulsants, muscle relaxants, and neurological agents.

categories.name: Psychiatric / Mental Health
categories.description: Antidepressants, antipsychotics, anxiolytics, and mood stabilizers.

categories.name: Renal / Urinary
categories.description: Diuretics, urinary antispasmodics, and kidney-related medications.

categories.name: Respiratory
categories.description: Bronchodilators, corticosteroids, and mucolytics for airway management.

categories.name: Sensory / Ophthalmic
categories.description: Eye drops, ophthalmic preparations, and sensory medications.
